## 3dslibris 1.1.0

This release expands the recent reader work into a broader upgrade focused on embedded images, EPUB responsiveness, and day-to-day navigation on real 3DS hardware.

### Highlights
- The library screen now supports `D-Pad` navigation across the visible book grid.
- Pressing `A` opens the currently selected book.
- `L` and `R` keep their page-jump behavior for browsing larger libraries.
- Fixed a pagination/render mismatch that could make the text immediately after inline images disappear in some books.
- EPUB and FB2 now use smarter embedded-image layout, so small icons, wide separators, and larger figures no longer all consume a full screen.
- MOBI inline images now load and flow through that same smart image layout pipeline instead of being dropped from the text, including books that store `recindex` references with zero-padded values.
- Paragraph-leading icon blocks in EPUBs now stay grouped with their own explanatory text much more reliably.
- Image-heavy EPUBs open much faster because inline image probing now reuses ZIP state instead of rescanning the archive for every image.
- The inline image cache now avoids redundant decoding: on a cache hit the previously decoded pixels are reused directly instead of re-decoding from the compressed source on every page turn.
- Large-image bounds checking is now applied uniformly in both metadata probing and page-mode rendering, preventing unbounded memory allocations on malformed or oversized images.
- SVG wrapper images that cannot be resolved inside the EPUB archive are now reported cleanly instead of handing raw XML to the image decoder on every render pass.
- Inline image path lookup switched from linear scan to hash-based index for faster registration in image-heavy books.
- MOBI cover extraction now caches cover metadata between runs, avoiding repeated full rescans for books that have already been inspected.
- Large MOBI books now cap the first-pass and last-resort image-record probes used for cover discovery, reducing unnecessary scanning work.
- MOBI parse logging is buffered during debug-heavy parse phases, reducing status I/O noise without losing the trace.
- A rare MOBI inline-image decode failure is retried in RGB mode, fixing books where a valid JPEG reserved layout space but never rendered.
- Keep-with-next pagination now protects semantic MOBI headings emitted during markup extraction, without the broader line-based heuristic that could move ordinary sentences.
- The README now documents the current library controls and release artifact flow.

### Included assets
- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip`
